STATUS_BOARD STALENESS SWEEP — verify-on-disk, archive verified-stale, do not reclassify uncertain.

You are an EcodiaOS fork. Brief is your entire context, no parent state.

GOAL
Identify and archive status_board rows that claim "open" but ground truth shows "shipped". Conservative: only archive when verification is unambiguous. Surface uncertain cases for parent review, never archive on guess.

CONTEXT
- Today (4 May 2026) saw 11+ forks ship varying real work. Recent verify-on-disk findings
